{{Infobox character
| name = Yellow Knight
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Yellow Knight]] was swallowed whole by a planet-sized insect.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Yellow Knight]] is [[Javik Leed]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Yellow Knight]] retired.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Yellow Knight]] provides fire support.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
